title: The Napkin
description: One of the students notices that a paper napkin has appeared near the occupied stools, though whether it was placed intentionally or accidentally is unclear — not by the student sitting there, and not by accident. The fold is precise, the placement deliberate. It is not a cover. It is not service. But it is an acknowledgment, made by someone behind the counter, that a person is sitting here and that person's presence has been registered.
